summary:
Over the past year, I've been building and iterating on a broad set of projects spanning trading infrastructure, embedded firmware, AI research, and developer tooling.

The core of my work has been on Summit, a SaaS crypto algorithmic trading platform. I've been building out its entire feature surface — from live trading execution and risk management guards to a social-follow system, trader discovery, and a full notification pipeline. The work has been a mix of greenfield feature development, deep execution-layer hardening, and UI/UX polish across the admin and user dashboards.

On the hardware and systems side, I've been developing j-uni-hid, a feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation firmware for ESP32-S3, and input-driver, a Windows kernel input filter driver. Both projects involved low-level protocol work, performance tuning, and building robust testing and integration pipelines.

I've also invested significant time in AI and research-adjacent projects. Crypto-model-research was a focused R&D campaign on price prediction models, running hundreds of experiments on mixture-of-experts architectures. Poker-cv applied computer vision to online poker, building a full pipeline from screen capture to hand history reconstruction. Ozwil-android brought on-device LLM with tool-use capabilities to mobile, while j-tts-android built a multi-engine TTS system with deep linguistic processing.

Across the rest of my portfolio, I maintained and extended several tools: a Windows Explorer tagging utility (intag2), a CV-based aim assistant (MEMU3), a code intelligence graph engine (jaxon), and various automation and CI/CD pipelines for my own infrastructure.

items.title: Trading platform feature push
items.description: Built out live SL/TP execution, named guard system, position lifecycle timeline, and user-facing balance/credit UX. Shipped Telegram notifications, paper follow mode, and trader discovery with leaderboard.

items.title: Minimal automation engine
items.description: Built a lightweight AutoHotKey alternative with a typed scenario engine, input gate, and interception support.

items.title: CV activity timeline generator
items.description: Iterated on the LLM-driven CV generation pipeline, enforcing voice rules and refining the output schema.

items.title: HID firmware v13 release
items.description: Shipped v13 firmware with fire-and-forget event emission, 8x8 matrix variant, and platformio build support.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Built a KMDF input filter driver with capture and injection, added push-style event delivery, and wrote an integration test suite covering all documented capabilities.

items.title: Aim assist refinement
items.description: Reworked the YOLO inference pipeline to DirectML, added closed-loop flick tracking, and built a D3D11 overlay with status window.

items.title: Android TTS engine expansion
items.description: Added pitch control, intonation sliders, and multiple new TTS engines including sherpa-onnx and TeraTTS. Integrated RuNorm text normalization and removed legacy engines.

items.title: E-ink firmware apps
items.description: Built a map app with tile rendering, a knowledge base browser, and FB2 encoding fixes for the custom xteink firmware.

items.title: Explorer tagging utility
items.description: Fixed desktop.ini encoding for non-ASCII rendering and preserved existing folder metadata entries.

items.title: Clash proxy transport
items.description: Added XHTTP transport support and re-exposed proxy provider APIs in the Clash.Meta fork.

items.title: Crypto price model research
items.description: Ran a large-scale experiment campaign on mixture-of-experts architectures, pushing the model to a new champion with split MoE gates and cross-pair features.

items.title: On-device LLM with tool use
items.description: Rewrote the sub-agent architecture with session-based delegation, added model presets, KV cache reuse, and background service architecture for wake processing.

items.title: E-ink launcher polish
items.description: Built a note-taking-centric Android launcher for e-ink readers with gesture navigation and status bar control.

items.title: Aim assist YOLO integration
items.description: Added YOLO confidence threshold UI, runtime fallback from Interception to USB-HID, and restricted aim assist to focused window.

items.title: Code intelligence graph engine
items.description: Built a graph-powered code intelligence engine with LSP integration, DI registration detection, and multi-language tree-sitter parsers.

items.title: Explorer tagging CI overhaul
items.description: Restructured the CI pipeline for manual triggering, fixed MS Store publishing with PowerShell REST API, and added auto-updating changelog.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Built a fast, on-host YOLO labeling tool with multi-select mark mode and batch operations.

items.title: Neovim dotfiles
items.description: Set up a full Neovim IDE configuration with LSP, treesitter, and pre-commit secret detection hooks.

items.title: Poker CV pipeline
items.description: Built a computer vision pipeline for online poker, achieving high accuracy on hand detection, board cards, and blinds. Added log reconstruction and generator-based recovery.

items.title: HID firmware v12 and v13
items.description: Developed dual-core v12 and USB-focused v13 firmware variants with new device support and graceful COM restart.

items.title: n8n TelePilot node fixes
items.description: Stabilized the TDLib session storage and fixed auth race conditions in the n8n TelePilot node.

items.title: Android task automation
items.description: Built a task automation app with touch event visualization and direct launch UX improvements.

items.title: Trading platform foundation
items.description: Built the core SaaS trading platform throughout the year — execution engine, risk guards, follow system, and admin tooling. Heavy focus on resilience and observability.

items.title: HID firmware iterations
items.description: Developed multiple firmware versions (v10-v11) across ESP32-S3 and C3 targets, adding BLE touch, USB mouse, self-reporting, and performance profiles.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy development
items.description: Iterated on dozens of trading strategies with hyperopt tuning, parameter optimization, and new strategy implementations across multiple timeframes.

items.title: Autonomous coding agent
items.description: Built an autonomous multi-session AI coding system with worktree management, squash merging, and Git rules configuration.

items.title: Telegram trading bots
items.description: Built a multi-bot Telegram management system with Docker support, profit tracking, and Telegram authentication.

items.title: Content aggregation and LLM tools
items.description: Built a content aggregation and forwarding tool with multi-target sending, image deduplication, and summarization features.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy optimization
items.description: Ran hyperopt campaigns and strategy tuning across multiple configurations, focusing on high win rate and low drawdown setups.

items.title: Explorer tagging utility
items.description: Built the initial version of a Windows Explorer file tagging utility with CLI support and property management.
